name: Juice Shop — JWT verified without an algorithm allowlist

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: Forged Signed JWT.

notes: verify(token) calls jws.verify(token, publicKey) with no algorithm pinned, so a token forged with alg:none or HS256 (using the public key as the HMAC secret) can pass verification. Fix pins algorithms: ['RS256'] via jwt.verify. Coverage gap closed by new rule B-22.
